growth_records.cite: Weiss, Anna S. et al. In vitro interaction network of a synthetic gut bacterial community. The ISME Journal (2022). DOI:10.1038/s41396-021-01153-z. [PMC8941000]
growth_records.snippet: slow growing strains (GR < 1 h-1, ... T. muris YL45) ... Formic acid was produced by several strains and consumed by T. muris YL45 and B. coccoides YL58.
growth_records.notes: Classified 'slow' (GR < 1 h-1) = UPPER BOUND; exact value in Table S2 (unavailable); growth_rate_per_h left null. Consumes formate (qualitative, SCFA LC-MS). No secretion products specified in main text; no numeric rates.
